pr.title: [Non-Record Submission] CompressedUT CE + EMA Export + Export-Aligned Late QAT (1.4457 BPB)

output.summary: CompressedUT CE-only model combines compressed latent backbone with EMA exports and export-aligned late QAT to shrink the quantized artifact gap under 16MB.
techniques: compressed latent backbone with conv front-end and autoregressive byte decoder
EMA-exported weights plus export-aligned late QAT
wider int6 clip-search grid for artifact packing
